description: The DroneCamera is a component commonly used in 3rd person free cam desktop. It can also be influenced via Command Line Arguments to change it's behavior.

fields.CameraUser: The user that should be simulating this camera.
fields.SimulateOnHost: Whether to simulate the camera on the host.
fields.ManualControl: Whether the user is manually controlling the camera.
fields.SlowSpeed: meters per second to move when going slow.
fields.Speed: Meters per second when going normal speed.
fields.FastSpeed: meters per second when holding shift.
fields.FieldOfViewSource: The field to use as the field of view value.
fields.FieldOfView: The field of view in absence of a value for ``FieldOfViewSource``.
fields.AspectRatioSource: The field to use as the aspect ratio source.
fields.AspectRatio: The aspect ratio in absence of a value for ``AspectRatioSource``.
fields.ControllerRejectDistance: Distance limit for rejecting a controller.
fields.GroupSearchRadius: The radius to search for groups of users.
fields.BiggestGroupSearchInterval: The time to wait before checking for the largest group of users in the world to track.
fields.HeadForwardPointDistance: The distance from a user's head in a group to stay back from when the camera in front of them.
fields.HeadBackwardPointDistance: The distance from a user's head in a group to stay back from when the camera is behind them.
fields.HeadUpPointDistance: The distance from a user's head in a group to stay back from when the camera is above them.
fields.HeadDownPointDistance: The distance from a user's head in a group to stay back from when the camera is below them.
fields.HeightOffset: How far up or down to look from a target user's view point.
fields.CircleOffset: The offset from the circle around a user to position this component
fields.DistanceOffset: The distance offset to have from a target.
fields.CircleSpeed: How fast to travel a circle around a target.
fields.PositionSpeed: The speed of this component's position change.
fields.LookSpeed: The look around speed of the camera.
fields.DistanceSpeed: How fast to close the distance in seconds to a target position when focusing on something or a UI.
fields.UserInfluenceSpeed: How fast to restore user influence.
fields.HeightAmplitude: The height Amplitude for a target height.
fields.DistanceAmplitude: The distance Amplitude for a target distance from a subject.
fields.CircleAmplitude: The circle Amplitude for a circle distance.
fields.HeightPeriod: The period in which to change height.
fields.DistancePeriod: The period in which to change distance.
fields.CirclePeriod: The period in which to change circle distance.
fields.CirclePeriodNoiseSpeed: The speed of noise influence on the circle period attribute.
fields.CirclePeriodNoiseInfluence: The influence of noise on the circle period attribute.
fields.CheckOcclusion: Whether to check if a subject has parts of them occluded.
fields.AdjustHeightOnOcclusion: Whether to adjust camera height when the target is occluded.
fields.TeleportWaitTime: How long to wait before teleporting to a target position.
fields.TeleportTriggerRelativeDistance: How far of a distance is needed to teleport to a target position.
fields.TeleportTriggerAngle: How big of an angle needed to teleport to a target rotation.
fields.MinRandomizeFovInterval: The minimum time to wait before randomly changing the camera FOV.
fields.MaxRandomizeFovInterval: The maximum time to wait before randomly changing the camera FOV.
fields.MinFov: The minimum FOV this camera can randomly change to.
fields.MaxFov: The maximum FOV this camera can randomly change to.
fields.MinChangeFovTime: The minimum time it takes for the FOV on this camera to change randomly.
fields.MaxChangeFovTime: The maximum time it takes for the FOV on this camera to change randomly.

usage: Used in free cam mode or to follow groups.
